title: M.E / M.Tech Jobs 2026 – Project Associate I
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Associate-I. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E. or M.Tech./M.E./M.S Can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 10-06-2026. For detailed information please visit IIT Ropar official website.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Ropar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Associate-I. Candidates with B.Tech/B.E. or M.Tech./M.E./M.S Can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 10-06-2026. For detailed information please visit IIT Ropar official website.

application_fee.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. or M.Tech./M.E./M.S. in Electrical Engineering or Electronics or similar field or equivalent qualification with 60% marks (or 6 grade points out of 10)
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.E. or M.Tech./M.E./M.S. in Electrical Engineering or Electronics or similar field or equivalent qualification with 60% marks (or 6 grade points out of 10).

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Project Associate-I position at IIT Ropar?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Associate-I position at IIT Ropar is scheduled for 10 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The required qualification is a B.Tech/B.E. or M.Tech./M.E./M.S. in Electrical Engineering or Electronics or a similar field, with at least 60% marks or 6 grade points out of 10.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-I position at IIT Ropar.

faq.question: What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the IIT Ropar office. Specific timings and venue details should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job, as indicated in the job type for the Project Associate-I position.

seo_tags: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026
